mapper.select: SELECT notice_id, title, content, target, created_at, updated_at FROM notice WHERE target = 'ALL' OR target = #{role} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT notice_id, title, content, target, created_at, updated_at FROM notice ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, content, target) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{target})
mapper.select:
SELECT notice_id AS noticeId, title, content, target, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM notice
AND target = #{target}
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY created_at DESC
